YESHUNGUANG-BURNING_CLARTITY.title: Burning Clartity
YESHUNGUANG-BURNING_CLARTITY.description: Whenever you have no [gold]Enlightened Mind[/gold], every time you play [blue]{Count}[/blue] attack cards, gain [blue]{Force}[/blue] [gold]Qingming Sword Force[/gold].Enemies with [gold]Fragile[/gold] take -{FDamage} damage.
YESHUNGUANG-BURNING_CLARTITY.flavor: Core Passive Effect of Ye Shunguang.
YESHUNGUANG-CASE_FULL_OF_LIGHT.title: Case Full Of Light
YESHUNGUANG-CASE_FULL_OF_LIGHT.descripti: Whenever you have no [gold]Enlightened Mind[/gold], every time you play [blue]{Count}[/blue] attack or skill cards, gain [blue]{Force}[/blue] [gold]Qingming Sword Force[/gold].Enemies with [gold]Fragile[/gold] take -{FDamage} damage.
YESHUNGUANG-CASE_FULL_OF_LIGHT.flavor: Used to boost the acquisition rate of [gold]Qingming Sword Force[/gold].
YESHUNGUANG-DREAMBOUND_SELF.title: Dreambound Self
YESHUNGUANG-DREAMBOUND_SELF.flavor: Countless times, in the dead of night, she finds herself returning to that day...
YESHUNGUANG-LANTERN_WISH.title: Lantern Wish
YESHUNGUANG-LANTERN_WISH.description: Whenever the [gold]Enlightened Mind[/gold] is removed, play a random card in [gold]Hand[/gold].
YESHUNGUANG-LANTERN_WISH.flavor:
"I want to be one light among countless firefiles."
"The sun will rise. No matter how long the night lasts, dawn always comes."
YESHUNGUANG-SWORDSWOMAN.title: Swordswoman
YESHUNGUANG-SWORDSWOMAN.description: At the start of the combate, add a [gold]Soaring Light[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold]
YESHUNGUANG-SWORDSWOMAN.flavor:
"What is someone who wides a blade?"
"Nothing more than...the courage to press forward without hesitation, and the resolve to cut through anything."
YESHUNGUANG-TOGETHER_INTO_THE_DUST.title: Together Into The Dust
YESHUNGUANG-TOGETHER_INTO_THE_DUST.descr: Whenever you gain [gold]Ether Veil[/gold], apply [blue]{VulnerablePower}[/blue] [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to ALL enemies.
YESHUNGUANG-TOGETHER_INTO_THE_DUST.flavo:
"I understand."
"I will live my whole life alongside [red]Loss[/red]."
YESHUNGUANG-GUIDING_GLIMMER.title: Guiding Glimmer
YESHUNGUANG-GUIDING_GLIMMER.description: The cost of the [gold]Partner[/gold] card is reduced by [blue]1[/blue].
YESHUNGUANG-GUIDING_GLIMMER.flavor:
"My brother, Shifu, everyone at Suibian Temple... and you."
"I know you'll all keep waiting for me."
YESHUNGUANG-LIGHT_SHADOW.title: Light & Shadow
YESHUNGUANG-LIGHT_SHADOW.description: Increase the cap of [gold]Qingming Sword Force[/gold] by [blue]{Max}[/blue].
YESHUNGUANG-LIGHT_SHADOW.flavor: In endless solitude and ever-present fear, [gold]another self[/gold] quietly came into being.
YESHUNGUANG-CLANG_OF_JADE.title: Clang Of Jade
YESHUNGUANG-CLANG_OF_JADE.description: Whenever you gain [gold]Enlightened Mind[/gold], gain [blue]1[/blue] more.
YESHUNGUANG-CLANG_OF_JADE.flavor: One of Ye Shunguang's Tactical Prism, can only be bought in stores.
